content:
# Turbidity

**Summary**: A measure of the cloudiness or haziness of acolloid/liquid caused by large/small particles.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-he|He, 2015]] measured turbidity to assess the effectiveness of PAM in improving water clarity.

## Scientific Context

- [[2015-he|He, 2015]] Used as a primary indicator for the success of the demulsification process.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2015-he|He, 2015]] Measured using a HACH 2100N Turbidimeter.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The concentration of 800 mg/L showed the lowest turbidity (14 NTU for brine; 10.9 NTU for seawater). ([[2015-he|He, 2015, p. 70]])
